summary: DivyaVastrav is a ladies clothing brand specializing in Jaipuri Skirts, Short Kurtis, and Sarees. The project is a premium e-commerce style web presence with a red aesthetic interface (shades of red, yellow, pink, golden), Royal Jaipuri pattern borders, golden floral elements, soft glowing divine background, and a cute mini Krishna-Radha cartoon illustration in the header. Products show 'Price Updating Soon' with a Buy Now button (no payment system). Instagram contact link is included. The site is mobile-friendly and responsive.

existing_features.title: Create a homepage for DivyaVastra that displays the brand name prominently, a tagline about Gopi skirts and ladies clothing, a featured products/collection section, and a footer with business name and contact placeholder.

Design and apply a warm, festive, and elegant visual theme inspired by traditional Indian Gopi skirt aesthetics — using rich saffron, deep magenta, gold, and earthy tones with decorative typography and flowing layout motifs. Apply this theme consistently across all pages.
Display the product catalog fetched from the backend on the homepage collection section, showing each product's name, price, description, and image.

Redesign the entire website with a Radha Krishna devotional theme — use a divine color palette of deep peacock blue, gold, saffron, and lotus pink; incorporate decorative motifs such as peacock feathers, flute silhouettes, lotus flowers, and mandala borders throughout the UI (header, section dividers, hero background, cards). Apply this theme consistently across all components including Header, HeroSection, FeaturedProducts, AboutSection, and Footer.

Update the Footer component to replace any existing WhatsApp or placeholder contact link with the Instagram link https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1, displaying it prominently as the primary contact/social channel with the Instagram icon and the handle @divyavastra_.

Add a dedicated 'Short Kurtis' section on the homepage alongside the existing Gopi Skirts collection. Display Short Kurti products in a cute, pretty layout with pastel floral accents distinct from the Gopi Skirts grid. Use category filtering to separate and display the two product categories in their own labeled sections.

Use the uploaded product photos as product images in the catalog. Map the uploaded images to backend product records: use IMG_4047-1.jpeg and IMG_4047-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (red/gold floral lehenga), IMG_4044-1.jpeg and IMG_4044-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (navy/gold lehenga), IMG_4045-1.jpeg and IMG_4045-2.jpeg for a Gopi Skirt product (pink floral lehenga), and IMG_4048-1.jpeg and IMG_4048-2.jpeg for a Short Kurti product (white/purple block-print kurti). Serve these as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and update the backend seed imageUrl values accordingly.

Redesign the entire website visual theme to a red aesthetic using shades of red, crimson, deep pink, golden yellow, and warm pink. Replace the existing peacock-blue Radha Krishna palette with this new color scheme. Apply Royal Jaipuri pattern borders (geometric/floral Jaipuri-style SVG or CSS borders) as section dividers and card borders. Add golden floral decorative elements throughout. The background should feel divine, traditional, and Jaipuri — use a soft glowing warm gradient (deep red to golden to soft pink) as the base. Update Tailwind color tokens and CSS variables to reflect this palette consistently across all components (Header, HeroSection, GopiSkirtsSection, ShortKurtisSection, AboutSection, Footer, ProductCard).

Add a cute mini Krishna-Radha cartoon-style illustration in the Header component — small, elegant, not too large (approximately 48–64px tall). The illustration should complement the red/golden Jaipuri theme and appear next to the brand name/logo in the header.

Add a third product section for 'Sarees' on the homepage, alongside the existing Jaipuri Skirts (formerly Gopi Skirts) and Short Kurtis sections. Rename the 'Gopi Skirts' section to 'Jaipuri Skirts' throughout the UI. Seed 2–3 placeholder Saree products in the backend with 'Price Updating Soon' and a representative image URL. All three sections should display products with 'Price Updating Soon' label instead of a numeric price, and each product card should have a 'Buy Now' button that opens a WhatsApp order link (no payment processing). Apply hover zoom effect on all product images.

Redesign the HeroSection to feature the brand name 'DivyaVastrav' prominently with the tagline 'Elegant Traditional Ladies Wear'. The hero banner should have a divine, glowing Jaipuri-inspired background (using the new red/gold palette). Include a WhatsApp Order button as a CTA in the hero section. The hero should also incorporate a Krishna-Radha aesthetic element (illustration or decorative motif).

Update the AboutSection to describe DivyaVastrav as a Traditional Indian Ladies Clothing Brand specializing in Jaipuri Skirts, Short Kurtis, and Sarees. Redesign the section to match the new red/golden Jaipuri theme (remove peacock blue gradient). Include a Contact Section below or within About with a WhatsApp Order button and the Instagram link https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1.

Update the Footer component to include: social media icons (Instagram linking to https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1, and WhatsApp), a contact details placeholder section, and the text 'Designed with Love ❤️' at the bottom. Restyle the footer to match the new red/golden Jaipuri theme.

Ensure the entire website is fully mobile-responsive. All sections (Header, Hero, product sections, About, Contact, Footer) must display correctly on mobile screens (320px–768px). The header mobile menu, product grids, and hero banner should reflow gracefully on small screens.

Add a dedicated 'Gopi Dresses' product section on the homepage. Seed 2–3 Gopi Dress products in the backend under a 'Gopi Dress' category with 'Price Updating Soon' (null price) and WhatsApp Buy Now buttons. Display this section on the homepage alongside the existing Jaipuri Skirts, Short Kurtis, and Sarees sections, using the same red/golden Jaipuri theme styling.

new_feature_requests.summary: Redesign the website with a red aesthetic theme (shades of red, yellow, pink, golden) with Royal Jaipuri pattern borders, golden floral elements, soft glowing divine background, and a cute mini Krishna-Radha cartoon illustration in the header (cartoon style, elegant, not too big).
Add three product sections: 1) Jaipuri Skirts, 2) Short Kurti, 3) Sarees. Products should show 'Price Updating Soon' instead of prices, and have a Buy Now button without a payment system.
Add homepage sections: Hero banner with brand name DivyaVastrav, Featured Collection, About Us (Traditional Indian Ladies Clothing Brand), Contact Section, and WhatsApp Order Button.
Add footer with social media icons (including Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/divyavastra_?igsh=eGd4eTc2bGl4MzN1), contact details placeholder, and 'Designed with Love' text.
Use provided product photos in the gallery with responsive layout, hover zoom effect on product images.

Map the previously uploaded product images (IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4047-2.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-2.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-2.jpeg, IMG_4048-1.jpeg, IMG_4048-2.jpeg) as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and update the backend seed imageUrl values for all existing products (Jaipuri Skirts and Short Kurtis) to reference these local asset paths. Ensure the Gopi Dresses section products also use appropriate uploaded images from the same set if available.
